issue_title: `maximum()`: out-of-place returns incorrect unsigned output on type promotion.
surface_reasoning: Priority 1: labeled `module: correctness (silent)` + `module: cuda` + `actionable` + `high priority`. Title: `maximum()` out-of-place returns incorrect unsigned output on type promotion — silent wrong result in a CUDA element-wise op due to dtype promotion. Domain relevance: CUDA element-wise `maximum` kernel must handle unsigned integer type promotion correctly; the bug is in the CUDA kernel's output type computation path.
